title: Jumbo Beef Bone For Dogs - 2 Pack -100% Natural Long-Lasting Dog Bones for Puppies & Large Dogs
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 100% Natural & Meaty – A premium, single-ingredient beef shin bone, slowly roasted and naturally smoked with pieces of tendon and meat left on the bone. A rich, bold chew that offers a hearty, long-lasting treat for dogs who love real flavour.
Rich in Marrow & Natural Minerals – Packed with flavour and naturally occurring nutrients, offering a satisfying chew that keeps dogs engaged while they enjoy the delicious marrow inside.
Natural Source of Nutrition – Naturally contains omega-3 fatty acids, vitamins and essential minerals, offering a wholesome chew that supports everyday nutrition and overall well-being.
Long Lasting Dental Chew – Encourages chewing that may help reduce plaque and tartar build-up while promoting healthy teeth and gums. Ideal for medium to large dogs 6 months and over.
Hand-Selected & Pure – Each bone is individually inspected for quality and consistency, slow-roasted for natural flavour, and naturally odour-free with no chemicals, additives, or preservatives.
description: Product description Jumbo Beef Bone For Dogs - 2 Pack100% Natural Long-Lasting Dog Bones for Puppies & Large Dogs (Approx. 1kg / 30cm per bone) A premium, 100% natural beef shin bone slow-roasted to enhance flavour and naturally smoked with tendon and meat left on for added enjoyment. Rich in marrow and naturally occurring nutrients, this tough, long-lasting chew helps keep dogs occupied while supporting natural chewing instincts. Ideal for medium and large breeds, hand-selected for quality, and completely free from chemicals, additives, or preservatives. Naturally contains omega fatty acids, calcium and essential minerals for everyday wellbeing. Chewing may help support dental hygiene by reducing plaque and tartar build-up over time. Approx. 1kg per bone, 30cm length. Suitable for dogs 6 months+. Feed supervised with fresh water available. Store in a cool, dry place. Not for human consumption. Ingredients Beef Directions Suitable for all breed sizes and dogs 6 months plus. Feed supervised as part of a balanced diet. Ensure clean, fresh water is available at all times. Store in a dry cool place. Not fit for human consumption. See more
